productDisplayName: Wrangler Women's Lip Print White T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with snipped edges around the neckline and hemlines, buttoned foldover sleeve hems with snipped edges and graphic on the chestFittingComfortWash care Hand wash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Indulge the wild side of you in this white tee from wrangler. Team this with denim shorts for casual outings with friends, while the cotton fabric keeps you dry and comfortable through all seasons.
